name: Chilies Rellenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour oil into an electric deep fryer and preheat to 425°F (220°C) for 25 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, drain the green chili peppers and discard the seeds. Cut each pepper into 12 strips.
3. Cut the cheddar cheese into 12 cubes.
4. Wrap a chili strip around each cube of cheese. Dredge each assembly in flour.
5. In a bowl, beat the egg whites to soft peaks. Beat together the egg yolks, flour, and salt until smooth. Gradually fold in the beaten egg whites until well combined.
6. Dip each cheese and chili assembly into the egg mixture, then drop them into the hot oil.
7. Fry until golden brown. Use tongs to pour a little more oil over the chilies while frying to help brown the tops.
8. Remove from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. Serve on a warm platter topped with red chili sauce or rellenos sauce.
